title: SchemaDriftIgnoreConfig
description: Defines ignore rules that suppress expected schema changes.

rules.description: List of ignore rules. A change matching ANY rule is suppressed.

table.description: Table name to match. Null means any table.

column.description: Column name to match. Null means any column.

change_type.description: Change type value to match (e.g. 'column_added'). Null means any type.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for why this change is ignored.
